name: Bleeding
effect: Cannot recover wounds or receive healing.
duration: Lasts 1 minute

name: Broken
effect: Physical Disadvantage
duration: Lasts 6 weeks

name: Concussion
effect: Mental Disadvantage, Spellcasting Disadvantage
duration: Until a Long Rest

name: Coughing
effect: Mental Disadvantage
duration: Until a Press On or irritant removed

name: Dislocation
effect: Physical Disadvantage
duration: Until a Long Rest, or Survival Check

name: Slowed
effect: Movement halved
duration: Until source removed

name: Pinned
effect: Cannot move; restrained by an object or creature.
duration: Until source removed, or Off-Action removal

name: Prone
effect: Disadvantage on ranged attacks; advantage for melee attacks against you.
duration: Requires 15 ft of movement to stand.

name: Blind
effect: Disadvantage on attack checks; attacks against you have advantage.
duration: Off-Action removal if possible; permanent effects require a healer

name: Charmed
effect: Mental Disadvantage; cannot attack the source of the charm.
duration: Ends based on the charm's source

name: Confused
effect: Mental Disadvantage; attacks against you have advantage.
duration: Until end of next turn or Press On

name: Deaf
effect: Stealth disadvantage; Spellcasting disadvantage
duration: Lasts 1 minute or source removed

name: Fear
effect: Must dash away or hide until the end of your next turn.
duration: Ends if you cannot see the source for a full round; typically cannot be the same source twice.

name: Intangible
effect: Immune to physical damage; cannot attack; movement halved.
duration: Ends after the effect's duration or through magical disruption. Cannot move through inorganic material.

name: Invisible
effect: Cannot be targeted by opportunity attacks; attacks against you have disadvantage.
duration: Ends after making an aggressive action or when revealed by substances like powder or oil.

name: Stunned
effect: Disadvantage on all checks; movement halved.
duration: Until end of next turn or Press On

name: Exhaustion
effect: Disadvantage on all checks; movement halved.
duration: Persists until a long rest, magical recovery, or specific intervention (e.g., caffeine).

name: Constrained
effect: Cannot make attack actions; attacks against you have advantage.
duration: Off-Action removal if possible; escape check from restraints

name: Unconscious
effect: Unable to act; vulnerable to critical hits and Finishers.
duration: Ends after a set duration, damage taken, or Off-Action ally assistance.

name: Exposed
effect: Take double damage
duration: Until end of next turn or Press On

name: Injured
effect: At 0 wounds, any further damage causes immediate Death.
duration: Healing removes the condition. Excess damage does not carry over.

name: Death
effect: Character dies and cannot interact with the living world.
duration: Only resurrection magic can remove this condition.
